title: 电影感叙事场景图
description: Using REFERENCE_0, transform the subject's appearance to a {argument name="style" default="trad goth"} aesthetic while preserving the exact pose, clothing structure, and background. Change her hair to {argument name="hai
prompt_raw: Using REFERENCE_0, transform the subject's appearance to a trad goth aesthetic while preserving the exact pose, clothing structure, and background. Change her hair to black with choppy bangs. Apply heavy dark makeup, specifically black lipstick and intense dark eyeshadow, and make her skin tone slightly paler. Add 2 facial piercings: a septum ring and a nostril stud. Finally, modify her layered necklaces to feature an inverted cross and a pentagram.
prompt_preview: Using REFERENCE_0, transform the subject's appearance to a {argument name="style" default="trad goth"} aesthetic while preserving the exact pose, clothing structure, and background. Change her hair to {argument name="hai
prompt_display_cn: 这是一个基于参考图的人像风格改造提示词，目标是在保持姿势、服装结构和背景不变的前提下，把人物改成特定审美风格。适合妆容变体、亚文化造型、角色风格迁移和造型方案预览。
prompt_template_cn: 基于【参考图】，将人物外观改造成【目标风格】审美，同时保持原图的姿势、服装结构和背景不变。将头发改为【发色】和【发型】。妆容改为【妆容描述】，包括【唇色】、【眼妆】和【肤色调整】。加入【面部饰品/穿孔】等细节。将项链、配饰或服装细节替换为【新配饰元素】。整体要自然融合，不改变人物基本构图，不要让背景和服装结构跑偏。
variables_json: [{"key":"参考图","label":"参考图","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"目标风格","label":"目标风格","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"发色","label":"发色","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"发型","label":"发型","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"妆容描述","label":"妆容描述","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"唇色","label":"唇色","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"眼妆","label":"眼妆","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"肤色调整","label":"肤色调整","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"面部饰品/穿孔","label":"面部饰品/穿孔","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"新配饰元素","label":"新配饰元素","type":"text","required":true}]
